title: The Data Detective
description: Learn the difference between good data and bad data when training an AI.

steps.content: Detective Dan is training his new robot dog, Bytes, to find apples. He gives Bytes 5 pictures of apples, and 1 picture of a banana by mistake.

steps.question: What happens if Bytes learns from the banana picture?
options: Bytes might think bananas are apples

steps.content: Right! If we give AI the wrong information (bad data), it makes mistakes. That's why the photos we feed AI really matter. Keep the data clean!

steps.instruction: Which pile of pictures is the best 'Good Data' for teaching a robot what a cat looks like?
options: Pictures of dogs, cats, and birds all mixed

steps.content: You are a top Data Detective! Bytes only looks at clear cat pictures now.
